hero.title: AI4Teachers
hero.titleSub: Your Guide to AI in Education
hero.subtitle: A free learning platform built for K-12 teachers. Whether you're just starting out or ready to dive deeper — we'll help you find the right path.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Explore curated lessons and resources across four key areas of AI in education
home.choosePathSubtitle: Everyone learns differently. Pick the approach that suits you.
home.pathNewTitle: I'm new to AI in education
home.pathNewDesc: Not sure where to start? Take a quick assessment and we'll create a personalized learning path just for you.
home.pathExperiencedTitle: I know what I'm looking for
home.pathExperiencedDesc: Already familiar with AI? Browse our full library of resources organized by topic and difficulty level.

resources.title: Learning Resources
resources.noResults: No lessons found matching your filters.
resources.comingSoon: Content coming soon! We're working on adding materials to this section.

kas.title: Knowledge Assessment
kas.description: This assessment will evaluate your current knowledge across 4 areas of AI in education and create a personalized learning path for you. It takes approximately 10 minutes.
kas.learningPathDesc: Based on your results, we recommend starting with these materials:
kas.selectAnswer: Please select an answer to continue
